chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-228 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 24-10-2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen, APG. **** Heard learned counsel for applicant and APG for the State and perused the impugned order, which reflects that learned Justice of Peace has discussed each and every facts of the case by assigning good reasons. No illegality or infirmity is found in the impugned order. Result thereof, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed leaving the applicant at liberty to file Direct Complaint before the Court having jurisdiction, if he is advised so. JUDGE Ahmad
